info.description: REST API for live stream configuration, ingest/publish lifecycle, DVR recordings, and event hooks.
info.title: Open Streamer API

get.description: Returns available hardware accelerators (OS-detected) and static enum lists for building configuration forms.
Returns 200 if the process is up.
Returns 200 when the server accepts traffic (basic check).

parameters.description: Relative start offset in seconds from recording start
parameters.name: offset_sec

parameters.description: Window duration in seconds (default: all remaining)
parameters.name: duration

code.description: Code is the unique key chosen by the user ([a-zA-Z0-9_]).

disabled.description: Disabled when true excludes the stream from server bootstrap and rejects pipeline Start.

dvr.description:
DVR overrides the global DVR settings for this specific stream.
If nil, the global config is used (when DVR is enabled globally).

inputs.description:
Inputs are the available ingest sources ordered by Priority.
The Stream Manager monitors health and switches between them on failure.

protocols.description:
Protocols defines which delivery protocols are opened for this stream.
The server opens a listener/packager for each enabled protocol.
Protocol-level config (ports, segment duration, CDN URL) lives in server config.

push.description:
Push is the list of external destinations the server actively pushes to.
Each entry defines one push target (YouTube, Facebook, Twitch, CDN relay, etc.).

stream_key.description: StreamKey is used to authenticate RTMP/SRT push ingest.

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail controls periodic screenshot generation for preview images.

transcoder.description:
Transcoder controls encoding/decoding settings.
nil means no transcoding for this stream.

watermark.description: Watermark is an optional text or image overlay applied before encoding.

bitrate.description: Bitrate is the audio bitrate in kbps.

copy.description: Copy copies origin audio without re-encoding.

normalize.description: Normalize applies EBU R128 loudness normalization.

sample_rate.description: SampleRate is output sample rate in Hz.

name.description:
Name is the FFmpeg decoder name.
"" = let FFmpeg choose automatically.
Examples: "h264_cuvid", "h264_qsv".

event_types.description: EventTypes filters which events trigger delivery. Empty = all events.

max_retries.description:
MaxRetries is the number of delivery attempts before giving up.
0 means use the server default (3).

metadata.description:
Metadata holds user-defined key-value pairs merged into every event payload
delivered by this hook. Useful for tagging events with custom context
(e.g. environment, tenant ID, region) without modifying the server config.

stream_codes.description:
StreamCodes filters delivery by stream code.
Only and Except are mutually exclusive; Only takes precedence when both are set.
Omitting the field (nil) means all streams are included.

timeout_sec.description:
TimeoutSec is the per-attempt delivery timeout in seconds.
0 means use the server default (10s).

headers.description:
Headers are arbitrary HTTP headers sent with every request for HTTP/HLS inputs.
Common uses:
  "Authorization": "Bearer <token>"
  "Authorization": "Basic <base64(user:pass)>"
  "X-Custom-Token": "secret"

net.description: Net controls reconnect and timeout behaviour.

params.description:
Params are extra URL query parameters merged into the source URL before
connecting. Used for protocols that carry credentials or options in the
query string (SRT ?passphrase=, S3 ?access_key= / ?secret_key=, etc.).
  "passphrase": "my-srt-passphrase"
  "access_key": "AKID..."   (S3)
  "secret_key": "wJal..."   (S3)

priority.description:
Priority determines failover order. Lower value = higher priority.
The Stream Manager always prefers the lowest-priority alive input.

url.description: URL is the source endpoint. See the package doc for supported formats.

connect_timeout_sec.description:
ConnectTimeoutSec caps each HTTP round-trip (headers + full body) for pull
readers that use net/http (e.g. HLS playlist and segment GETs). Zero uses
the reader's default (30s for HLS).

max_reconnects.description: MaxReconnects is the total number of reconnect attempts (0 = unlimited).

read_timeout_sec.description: ReadTimeoutSec is the max silence duration before declaring the input dead.

reconnect.description: Reconnect enables automatic reconnection when the input drops.

reconnect_delay_sec.description: ReconnectDelaySec is the initial delay before the first reconnect attempt.

reconnect_max_delay_sec.description: ReconnectMaxDelaySec caps the exponential backoff delay.

dash.description:
DASH enables MPEG-DASH packaging over HTTP.
Required for Widevine/PlayReady DRM.

hls.description:
HLS enables Apple HTTP Live Streaming (m3u8 + segments over HTTP).
Compatible with browsers, iOS, Android, Smart TVs.

rtmp.description: RTMP opens an RTMP publish endpoint for legacy players/CDNs.

rtsp.description: RTSP opens an RTSP listener for pull clients (VLC, broadcast tools).

srt.description: SRT opens an SRT listener port for contribution-quality pull.

comment.description: Comment is a human-readable note for this destination.

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether this destination is active.

limit.description: Limit is the maximum number of retry attempts. 0 = unlimited.

retry_timeout_sec.description: RetryTimeoutSec is the delay between retry attempts in seconds.

status.description:
Status is a runtime-only field updated by the publisher.
Not persisted to storage.

timeout_sec.description: TimeoutSec is the connection/write timeout in seconds.

url.description:
URL is the destination ingest endpoint.
Supported schemes:
  rtmp://  — plain TCP, default port 1935 (e.g. rtmp://a.rtmp.youtube.com/live2/{key})
  rtmps:// — TLS-wrapped RTMP, default port 443 (e.g. rtmps://live-api-s.facebook.com:443/rtmp/{key})

segment_dir.description:
SegmentDir is the absolute path to the directory holding TS files,
playlist.m3u8, and index.json.

except.description: Except delivers events for all streams except those in this list.

only.description: Only delivers events only for streams in this list.

max_size_gb.description:
MaxSizeGB caps total disk usage. Oldest segments pruned when exceeded.
0 = no limit.

retention_sec.description:
RetentionSec is the retention window in seconds.
0 = keep forever.

segment_duration.description:
SegmentDuration overrides the global segment length in seconds.
0 = use default (4s).

storage_path.description:
StoragePath overrides the default DVR root directory for this stream.
"" = use "./dvr/{streamCode}".

interval_sec.description: IntervalSec generates one thumbnail every N seconds.

output_dir.description:
OutputDir is relative to the publisher HLS directory.
E.g. "thumbnails" → written to {hls_dir}/{stream_code}/thumbnails/thumb.jpg

quality.description: Quality is the JPEG quality (1–31, lower = better). Default: 5.

width.description:
Width and Height of the output thumbnail in pixels.
0 = match source resolution.

extra_args.description:
ExtraArgs are raw FFmpeg arguments appended after the generated command.
Use with caution — may conflict with generated arguments.

gop.description: GOP sets keyframe interval in frames. 0 = encoder default.

bitrate.description: Bitrate is the target video bitrate in kbps. 0 = encoder auto.

framerate.description: Framerate is the output frame rate (fps). 0 = match source.

keyframe_interval.description:
KeyframeInterval is the GOP size in seconds.
Must match or be a multiple of the HLS/DASH segment duration.

level.description:
Level controls the H.264/H.265 encoding level.
Common: "3.1", "4.0", "4.1", "4.2", "5.0", "5.1"

max_bitrate.description: MaxBitrate caps the peak bitrate in kbps (CBR/VBR ceiling). 0 = no cap.

preset.description:
Preset controls the encoder speed/quality tradeoff.
libx264: "ultrafast" | "superfast" | "veryfast" | "faster" | "fast" | "medium" | "slow" | "veryslow"
NVENC:   "p1" (fastest) .. "p7" (highest quality)

profile.description:
Profile controls the H.264/H.265 encoding profile.
"baseline" | "main" | "high" (H.264); "main" | "main10" (H.265)

width.description:
Width and Height define the output resolution.
Set to 0 to keep the source dimensions (Width=0 & Height=0 = no scaling).

copy.description: Copy copies origin video without re-encoding.

profiles.description: Profiles defines ABR renditions when re-encoding.

font_color.description: FontColor in FFmpeg color syntax. E.g. "white", "#FFFFFF", "white@0.8".

font_file.description:
FontFile is the path to a .ttf/.otf font file.
"" = FFmpeg default font.

image_path.description: ImagePath is the path to the watermark image (PNG with alpha recommended).

offset_x.description: OffsetX and OffsetY are pixel offsets from the chosen position edge.

opacity.description: Opacity controls transparency: 0.0 = fully transparent, 1.0 = fully opaque.

position.description: Position is the corner/center anchor for the watermark.

text.description:
Text is the string to render. Supports strftime directives for live timestamps.
E.g. "LIVE %{localtime:%H:%M:%S}"
